title: The Moon and Sixpence
actors: George Sanders, Herbert Marshall, Doris Dudley
plot: Loosely inspired by Gauguin's life, the story of Charles Strickland, a middle-aged stockbrocker who abandons his middle-class life, his family, and his duties to start painting, as he has always wanted to do. He is from then on a ...
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 3 wins & 2 nominations total
